body:
## Summary
- Reuses the shared punctuation-stripping glossary normalizer for ranked question search.
- Adds focused validate-content coverage for search URL hydration and question-search punctuation parity.
- Extends search route tests so punctuated queries must keep question results visible.

## Validation
- `node --test tests/content-search-route-copy-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'search|normaliz|punctuation|hydration'`
- `npm run validate:content -- --focus-search-route-query-hydration`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`

Browser e2e was attempted, but this host has no Chromium binary and `npx playwright install chromium` reports that this Playwright package does not support ubuntu26.04-x64.
title: search: normalize punctuated question queries
